reach_why: Extends familiar critique of inductive bias to decomposition search and stylistic truth-exclusion in scientific discovery systems.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links fallibilism, search decomposition, and human-trained filters selecting familiar-looking falsehood over alien truth.
falsifiable_why: Test by constructing domains with true alien statements and measuring whether human-trained filters systematically discard them.
explanation: Human-trained scientific filters may hide true discoveries by rejecting unfamiliar formulations and decompositions.
